title: Da Lat、Lam Dong — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Da Lat、Lam Dong的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Da Lat是Lam Dong的一个城市，人口约400,000。Vietnam’s hill station escape, known for its cool year-round climate, French colonial villas, flower gardens, and a romantic atmosphere that draws both tourists and expats.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
